basic_details.job_title: Collector's Office Pudukkottai Law Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 31 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Collector's Office Pudukkottai has released the official Law Officer Notification 2026 for 31 vacancies. Eligible Advocates with not less than 7 years standing at the Bar for Public Prosecutor/Additional Public Prosecutor posts and not less than 10 years standing at the Bar for Special Public Prosecutor posts can apply offline on or before 30-06-2026. The recruitment is contractual, and candidates should refer to Advt No. R.C.C2/E-4584251/2026 for complete eligibility, application process, and required documents.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate with not less than 7 years standing at the Bar for Public Prosecutor/Additional Public Prosecutor and not less than 10 years for Special Public Prosecutor
qualification.details: Advocate with not less than 7 years standing at the Bar for Public Prosecutor/Additional Public Prosecutor posts. Advocate with not less than 10 years standing at the Bar for Special Public Prosecutor posts.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Collector's Office Pudukkottai Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:pudukkottai.nic.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Collector's Office Pudukkottai Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Law Officer posts is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 31 vacancies announced for various Law Officer positions under the Collector's Office Pudukkottai recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be advocates with at least 7 years of standing at the Bar for Public Prosecutor/Additional Public Prosecutor roles, and 10 years for Special Public Prosecutor roles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for these positions is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Collector's Office Pudukkottai Law Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: The salary details for the Law Officer positions are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the formation of a panel of names of advocates who meet the eligibility criteria and are deemed suitable for the roles.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Collector's Office Pudukkottai in Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is R.C.C2/E-4584251/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply online for these posts?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. Online applications will not be accepted.
